title: Homeway (sethome)
description: A lightweight and easy-to-use home management plugin with a simple GUI for players
body:
HomeWay

HomeWay is a simple, lightweight, and efficient home management plugin for Spigot/Paper servers. It allows players to set multiple home locations and navigate between them using either commands or a clean Graphical User Interface (GUI).
🚀 Features:
Simple GUI: Access your homes through a visual menu using /homes.
Multiple Homes: Set and name your homes to stay organized.
Teleport Delay: Includes a 5-second teleport timer to prevent combat logging (can be configured).
User Friendly: Easy-to-remember commands and clear chat messages.
Permissions Support: Works out of the box with standard permission managers.
💻 Commands:
/sethome <name> - Save your current location as a home.
/home [name] - Teleport to a specific home or open the GUI.
/delhome <name> - Remove a saved home.
/homes - Open the visual homes menu.
🛠️ Permissions:
homeway.use - Allows players to use all HomeWay commands (Default: true).
